# Q3 2026 Financial Performance Report
**Warnes Innovations LLC — Confidential Internal Distribution**

## Executive Summary

This report covers Q3 2026 performance metrics across all business units.
Revenue grew 18% year-over-year, driven primarily by cloud subscriptions.
Operating margin improved to 24%, up from 21% in the prior quarter.

Total Q3 revenue: $4.2M (target: $3.8M — 110% attainment).

- Professional services: +12%
- One-time licence sales: +8%
